content.en:
"Sun's Grip!"

Ye Tian used this Eternal Dao Secret Technique and grabbed the Dongping Dao Master, but this was not to attack the Dongping Dao Lord, but to take away the Dongping Dao Lord.

Wow!

The Dongping Daoist took the entire shield, which was held by Ye Tian's Sun Grip, and then taken away.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian's duplicate body quickly fled, while the Xuanlin Ancient Vine seemed to be enraged and attacked wildly, and the dense vines continued to expand and expand, blocking this area.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian was also attacking frantically, but Xuanlin Guman's attack could almost ignore the distance, easily leapfrogging and attacking.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is not as good as Xuanlin Guman, but the difference in strength is not very big.

Therefore, this Xuanlin Ancient Vine could not defeat it in a short period of time.

Ye Tian fought and fled, gradually leaving the position of the Xuanlin Ancient Vine's body, and it only occasionally attacked across the void, and it didn't have to leave Ye Tian's thoughts.

After all, the Dongping Daoist has no value to it, and if it leaves, it will leave.

In this way, Ye Tian rescued the Dongping Dao Lord from Xuanlin Guman.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian left from here with the Dongping Dao Master.

Back in the outside world, Ye Tian immediately contacted the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm of the Taitian Realm 557 and informed them that he had rescued the Dongping Dao Master.

Soon.

The Heaven Survey Dao Lord and several other half-step Eternal Realm God Realms came over.

"Heaven Survey Dao Master, Dongping Dao Lord has been rescued, but his condition is not very good!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Lord Ye Heavenly Kingdom!" said the Heavenly Survey Dao Lord gratefully.

"The Ultimate Eternal Dao Boundary Stone!"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, come back to the Taitian Realm with us, and we'll give it to you!"

The main road of the Sky Survey Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he followed the Heaven Survey Dao Lord and them back to the Heavenly Realm.

......

The Heavenly Realm.

The Dongping Dao Lord was sent by them for treatment, while Ye Tian waited for the news of the Dao Lord of the Heavenly Survey.

Not long after, the Heaven Survey Dao Lord came over with the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, this is the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone!"

Ye Tian looked at the top-grade Eternal Dao Boundary Stone in the hands of the Heaven Survey Dao Master, which was somewhat similar to the ordinary Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, but it was bigger, its aura was more powerful, and its quality was naturally better.

After confirming that this was the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, Ye (CGBH) Tian accepted it and left.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian let this replica body return to the Endless Realm.

After he returned to the Endless Realm, he would use the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone to enter the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain.

The years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian returned to the Endless Realm, and then used the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone to shuttle into the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain.

Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian instantly shuttled into the Eternal Dao Realm, but he entered a mysterious area of the Eternal Dao Realm, which was the true domain of the Eternal Dao Realm.

......

A gray aura permeates this true realm.

"What a rich weird aura, more than a hundred times richer than the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In this case, if it is the Eternal Dao Realm, I am afraid that it will soon be demonized, and it will not be able to resist for long at all, and it will be the top half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and most of the Eternal Dao Species will be solidified, so it can last for a while.

However, it's not worth wandering here, it's not worth it.

It is estimated that only the existence of the Eternal Realm God Realm can survive when he enters here, and he will not be transformed by demons.

But the Eternal Realm Divine Realm can't enter here, so naturally there is no way to use the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone.

Therefore, if the other half-step Eternal Realm Gods did not prepare more treasures to resist the gray and strange aura here, they would not dare to come in, otherwise it would be a waste of the best Eternal Dao Boundary Stone.

And Ye Tian is not afraid of such a strange aura, not to mention a hundred times richer, even if it is a thousand times richer, it can't affect him.

That means he can stay here forever.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to condense the replica bodies one by one, and then let these replica bodies separate to find resources and the eternal national order.

"There are really a lot of resources, much more than the rest of the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

Of course, the Eternal Demon Spirits here are also even more terrifying, all of them are comparable to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

But Ye Tian still relied on his strong strength to kill these Eternal Demon Spirits one by one, and harvested a batch of high-grade Eternal Demon Crystals.

It's just that these Eternal Demon Crystals are useless to Ye Tian and his family, and can only be reduced to providing nourishment for the evil vines.

Not long after, Ye Tian finally discovered an Eternal National Order.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian received this Eternal National Order and smiled.

Unexpectedly, after such a short period of time, he received an eternal national order.

At this rate, he will receive a large number of Eternal Decrees just around the corner!

In the following years, Ye Tian found one eternal national decree after another, and obtained a lot of good things.

"It is worthy of the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, there are really many Eternal Decrees here!"

For the long years that followed, he continued to collect all kinds of resources and treasures here, and danger naturally existed.

Occasionally, he would encounter the kind of Eternal Demon Spirit whose strength was comparable to his own, and he would kill it for a long time before killing it.

If it was another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, even with his strength, he wouldn't dare to fight with the Eternal Demon Spirit for so long, otherwise there would definitely be a problem with the Eternal Dao Seed!

Unconsciously, tens of millions of years have passed.

Ye Tian explored everywhere one by one, and he lost several copies of his body alone, and finally gathered a hundred Eternal Decrees.

There are a hundred Eternal State Orders, if this is passed out, the other half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms will be dumbfounded, and even the Eternal Realm Divine Realm will feel incredible.

"One hundred Eternal Kingdom Decrees are enough to open up a hundred Eternal Kingdoms, and I can get rid of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance and directly go it alone and open up an Eternal Kingdom Alliance!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And he was ready to do so.

Subsequently, one of his replica bodies left the Eternal Dao Realm True Realm and returned to the Endless Realm.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian called his wife, son, and daughter over to hold an internal meeting of the high-level of the human race.

"Father!"

"Husband!"

They shouted.

"I asked you to come this time, because I have a big thing to announce!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out a hundred Eternal State Decrees.

"So many Eternal Decrees!" Ye Xingchen was shocked.

A hundred eternal kingdoms, this must open up a hundred eternal kingdoms!

"I'm going to find a suitable area far away from here, open up an eternal kingdom alliance, get rid of this place completely, and then only allow the human race to enter there to practice and develop, what do you think?"

Ye Tian asked.
